text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're carrying all that to the science lab? By yourself? Here,
let me help out!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thanks for always cleaning up! I'm going to go throw out this trash!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whew! That was some good training! Not only did it feel great, but it
was fun to boot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As always, Kita can't turn a blind eye to those in need. Meanwhile,
her training is going as smooth as butter.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me! I wanted to ask you something, Trainer... When I
make my break for the finish line, um...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I see! In the end, it all comes down to posture. If I can keep my legs
and upper body in line with each other while lowering my center of
gravity... Mm-hm.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um, do you mind if I run for a little while longer? I want to try out
some of the things you just taught me.
choice_data_list: Well, if it's only for a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you, thank you! All righty! Time to shave some time off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kita begins running again, and I can't help but be fascinated by her
charming, yet fierce, side profile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kita is always looking forward and searching for ways to better
herself. Her presence alone raises the morale of those around her.
choice_data_list: (I need to work just as hard!)
(I need to work just as hard!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rub my eyes and force myself wide-awake. I want to help Kita—not
because of my job as her trainer—but because I truly believe in her
potential.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Get this, Dad—my trainer is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The training we do is really tough, but I can feel myself improving
every single day!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whenever there's something on my mind, they always come up with
great tips and fresh ideas for my training!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Mhm, that's right. I can fret about a problem forever and ever without
finding a solution, but Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Agh, it's no use! The more I try to not think about them, the more I end up thinking about the people behind me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's just, when I try to focus only on what's in front of me, I get all
antsy...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... Like, what if they're about to overtake me? Or what if
there's someone who's come up right behind me?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And when that happens, I can't let them pass me, now can I? But when
I think about this stuff too much, it starts to affect my running...
choice_data_list: What do you think defines your running?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What defines my running? Front running, of course. I run, run some
more, and fly to the front of the whole pack.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: From start to finish, I keep up my pace so that even if someone were to try and catch up, I'd simply be too fast and too far in the front.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Basically, I keep my distance from the main pack and cross the finish
line first. That's how I run!
choice_data_list:
Then why are you worried about the racers
behind you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer always listens to me and helps me out. But that's not all,
either.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I'm dealing with a problem that needs a solution, they'll
give me a bunch of advice so I can find the answer for myself.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
One day, I want to be just as cool. I want to be able to respond to
people's problems without a second thought—just like that.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Th-that's true...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Right. That's right... It was so obvious this whole time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black realizes something from her father's words, tightly
clenching her fists with newfound resolve.
